task_goal: In Simple Calendar Pro, delete the calendar event on 2023-10-17 at 6h with the title 'Review session for Budget Planning'
task_goal_rewrite: The calendar event titled 'Review session for Budget Planning' scheduled for 2023-10-17 at 6h is deleted from Simple Calendar Pro.

checkpoints.description: The calendar event titled 'Review session for Budget Planning' scheduled for 2023-10-17 at 6h is no longer present in Simple Calendar Pro's calendar views.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshots of the 2023-10-17 day/week/month view in Simple Calendar Pro showing no event matching the specified title, date, and time; or a system confirmation message indicating successful deletion of the event.

checkpoints.description: The deletion action was initiated on the correct target event (title: 'Review session for Budget Planning', date: 2023-10-17, time: 6h).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the event's details page with the deletion option selected; or a deletion confirmation dialog displaying the event's exact title, date, and time prior to user confirmation.

success_rule: Success is achieved if both required checkpoints are satisfied: the correct target event was selected for deletion, and the event is no longer visible in Simple Calendar Pro's relevant calendar views.
